meaning: n.(德国民间文学中传说的女妖) 罗蕾莱
examples: Perhaps nobody signed leases at the Lorelei.
But the Lewis Morris didn’t have Yankee Stadium at its door; the Lorelei did.
He couldn't stay at the Lorelei, or he would be sucked into this team of chiselers.
"His peak's a little better, " Lorelei Tran said as she entered the room with Davis's inhaler.
Lorelei attached the spacer and handed it over to her as Davis compliantly opened his mouth.
